summary: Descriptive overview of secondamendment in substantive law: individual right, Heller/McDonald, permissible regulations.
key_points: individual right is a fundamental concept in constrights law.
Legal standards for secondamendment are established through case law and statutory interpretation.
Courts apply specific tests to determine secondamendment in litigation.
The doctrine of secondamendment has evolved through Supreme Court precedents.
Understanding secondamendment requires analysis of both historical context and modern applications.
philosophy_guard_statement: This fragment describes existing legal doctrines and their applications without advocating for normative changes.
